title: Hymenidium apiolens

The plant is also placed in the genus Hymenidium, a group of flowering plants native to South America. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics, such as its leaf and flower structure. Hymenidium apiolens is closely related to other Apiaceae species, sharing similar morphological features.
